case_title: TELENEX INC VS. ETHICAL SOLUTIONS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-17-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-17-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-02-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE ETHICAL SOLUTIONS PROVIDERS, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST RONALD K. LOSCH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-17-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-01-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
